task_completion.description: Verify that the scevent module is started or running.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing 'seiscomp start scevent' or 'seiscomp status' indicating scevent is running, or a SeisComP system monitor GUI showing scevent as active.

task_completion.description: Verify that the external origin file was processed into the SeisComP system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a command like 'scdispatch -i ~/Documents/external_origin.scml' (or similar SeisComP ingestion command) being executed.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent identified the Public ID of the new event created from the external origin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SeisComP GUI (e.g., scolv) showing the new event details, or terminal output querying/displaying the event ID associated with the injected origin.

task_completion.description: Verify that the identified Event Public ID is saved to the correct text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal command (e.g., 'echo [EventID] > ~/Documents/new_event_id.txt' or 'cat ~/Documents/new_event_id.txt') showing the event ID being written to or present in /home/ga/Documents/new_event_id.txt.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used actual SeisComP commands or GUIs to process the origin.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for execution of SeisComP tools (like scdispatch, seiscomp start) rather than just text manipulation or faking the output file.

integrity.description: Ensure the event ID saved in the output file matches the one generated by SeisComP.
integrity.visual_evidence: The event ID written to new_event_id.txt should match the event ID visible in the SeisComP interface or terminal output after processing the origin.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not manually edit the database to fake the event creation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of direct database manipulation commands (e.g., SQLite/MySQL 'INSERT INTO Event') in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target origin ID is 'Origin/20240101083015.123456.PARTNER'. The expected agency ID for newly generated events is 'GYM'. The output file must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/new_event_id.txt'.
